content: Hey, I'm trying to get back into the swing of things after my sabbatical. Any tips for managing a heavy workload after time off?
Welcome back! A gradual re-entry can help. What kind of cases are you working on right now?
I've got three major civil rights cases - one involving voting rights in Georgia, another about police reform in Chicago, and a housing discrimination case in New York.
Those sound like significant cases. How long were you traveling for your sabbatical?
I was gone for about six months, mostly backpacking through Eastern Europe - Poland, Hungary, Romania, and Bulgaria were my favorites.
That's quite a journey! How's the transition been back to work?
Honestly, it's been rough. I keep thinking about the beekeeping workshop I attended in Romania. I'm seriously considering starting a small apiary as a side project.
Beekeeping sounds fascinating! How would you balance that with your legal work?
I'm thinking weekends and maybe early mornings. I've already joined the local beekeepers association and found a mentor. Plus, I could use the honey in my terrible attempts at baking.
That's a great way to combine hobbies! Speaking of hobbies, what other interests do you have?
I do stand-up comedy at an open mic night every Thursday, and I'm training for a rock climbing competition next month. Gotta keep the adrenaline going!
